gt_sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Id = ( SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts WHERE ParentId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1 )
pred_sql: SELECT "users"."DisplayName" AS "DisplayName" FROM "posts" JOIN "users" ON "posts"."OwnerUserId" = "users"."Id" WHERE "posts"."ParentId" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "posts"."Score" DESC LIMIT 1
question: Describe the display name of the parent ID for child post with the highest score.
